audience.primary: Busy adults who want to plan healthy meals and hit nutrition goals
secondary: People with dietary restrictions (gluten-free, vegetarian, dairy-free)

value_proposition: Personalized meal planning and nutrition tracking with grocery lists and smart recipe suggestions.
features: Apple Health and Google Fit sync

ios.title: NourishWise
ios.subtitle: Plan meals & track nutrition
ios.promotional_text: Smarter meal plans for busy weeks.

android.title: NourishWise - Meal Planning App
android.short_description: Meal plan and track macros with recipes.
android.full_description: NourishWise helps you build healthier habits with meal plans and nutrition tracking.

notes: We do not want to target competitor brand names. Focus on meal planning and nutrition terms.
